title: Remove Duplicate Heap Analytics Script
description: A duplicate Heap Analytics JavaScript snippet was rendering at the bottom of the page. Since the Heap tracking code was already loaded elsewhere on the page, the second instance was redundant and needed to be removed to avoid double-tracking and unnecessary script loading.
acceptance_criteria: Only one instance of the Heap Analytics JavaScript is loaded per page
The duplicate script at the bottom of the page is removed
Heap Analytics continues to function correctly with the remaining single instance
middleware_changes: Removed the duplicate Heap Analytics JavaScript snippet from the page footer template.
implementation_notes: Simple removal of a redundant script tag. The primary Heap Analytics script remained in place.
comment_summary: Developer completed the removal and submitted for review.
